author: mp3li
title: myBratz (Movies V.)
description: Bratz (Movies V.) theme for the Innioasis Y1 mp3 player, including Bratz icons and Bratz backgrounds. Check the Patreon for the other Y2K Toybox themes. This theme may not be hosted elsewhere: only on mp3li original channels such as their Patreon and Github. Check license file in theme folder for more information.
